name: Termly
description: Termly — Privacy compliance platform generating privacy policies, cookie consent banners, and GDPR/CCPA compliance documents.

seo.title: Termly — Compliance Automation
seo.meta_description: Termly: Termly — Privacy compliance platform generating privacy policies, cookie consent banners, and GDPR/CCPA compliance documents.

when_to_use: GDPR and CCPA privacy policy generation for SaaS products
Cookie consent banner with scan-based cookie declaration
Data subject request intake and response workflow
Terms of service generator for legal compliance automation
Privacy center for consumer-facing CCPA rights management

pros: Cheap entry point for policies and cookie banners
Covers GDPR, CCPA, CalOPPA, and DSAR intake
Works across any website via script embed
cons: Templates read generic; may not fit unique business models
Consent logs and vendor management thinner than dedicated CMPs
Legal depth lower than iubenda for unusual clauses
Upsells add up once you need multiple domains
review.verdict: Good enough for small sites that need checkbox privacy compliance on a shoestring budget.
review.best_for: Solo operators and small sites wanting fast, cheap privacy basics
review.not_for: Enterprises or regulated industries needing bespoke legal content
